records.ety: [OE. asche, aske, AS. asce, æsce, axe; akin to OHG. asca, G. asche, D. asch, Icel. & Sw. aska, Dan. aske, Goth. azgo.]

defs: The earthy or mineral particles of combustible substances remaining after combustion, as of wood or coal.
Specifically: The remains of the human body when burnt, or when “returned to dust” by natural decay.
quotes: Their martyred blood and ashes sow.
The coffins were broken open. The ashes were scattered to the winds.

defs: The color of ashes; deathlike paleness.
quotes: The lip of ashes, and the cheek of flame.
